'''âw-b-t''' ('''kawabat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quantize|quantize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-b-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quantize|quantize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-b-t
|-
! Lemma
| kawabat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwabat|thiwabat]] || [[word:jiwabat|jiwabat]] || [[word:shiwabat|shiwabat]] || [[word:kiwabat|kiwabat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwabat|thuthuwabat]] || [[word:jujuwabat|jujuwabat]] || [[word:shushuwabat|shushuwabat]] || [[word:kukuwabat|kukuwabat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwabat|thuwabat]] || [[word:juwabat|juwabat]] || [[word:shuwabat|shuwabat]] || [[word:kuwabat|kuwabat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwabat|thuwabat]] || [[word:juwabat|juwabat]] || [[word:shuwabat|shuwabat]] || [[word:kuwabat|kuwabat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewabat|thewabat]] || [[word:jewabat|jewabat]] || [[word:shewabat|shewabat]] || [[word:kewabat|kewabat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowabat|thothowabat]] || [[word:jojowabat|jojowabat]] || [[word:shoshowabat|shoshowabat]] || [[word:kokowabat|kokowabat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowabat|thowabat]] || [[word:jowabat|jowabat]] || [[word:showabat|showabat]] || [[word:kowabat|kowabat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowabat|thowabat]] || [[word:jowabat|jowabat]] || [[word:showabat|showabat]] || [[word:kowabat|kowabat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwabat|thĂŠwabat]] || [[word:jĂŠwabat|jĂŠwabat]] || [[word:shĂŠwabat|shĂŠwabat]] || [[word:kĂŠwabat|kĂŠwabat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawabat|thathawabat]] || [[word:jajawabat|jajawabat]] || [[word:shashawabat|shashawabat]] || [[word:kakawabat|kakawabat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawabat|thawabat]] || [[word:jawabat|jawabat]] || [[word:shawabat|shawabat]] || [[word:kawabat|kawabat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawabat|thawabat]] || [[word:jawabat|jawabat]] || [[word:shawabat|shawabat]] || [[word:kawabat|kawabat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawabat|shawabat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawabat|goshawabat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawabat|gokishawabat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawabatnĂŒ|shawabatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawabatnknĂŒ|goshawabatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawabatnĂŒ|gokishawabatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawabatshĂ«|shawabatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawabatnkshĂ«|goshawabatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawabatshĂ«|gokishawabatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawabatro|shawabatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawabatnkro|goshawabatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawabatro|gokishawabatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawabatmu|shawabatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawabatnkmu|goshawabatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawabatmu|gokishawabatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawabatsher|shawabatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawabatnksher|goshawabatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawabatsher|gokishawabatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawabatng|shawabatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawabatnkng|goshawabatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawabatng|gokishawabatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawabatya|shawabatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawabatnkya|goshawabatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawabatya|gokishawabatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawabatyam|shawabatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawabatnkyam|goshawabatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawabatyam|gokishawabatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawabatnĂŒshĂ«|shawabatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawabatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawabatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawabatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawabatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawabatnĂŒro|shawabatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawabatnknĂŒro|goshawabatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawabatnĂŒro|gokishawabatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawabatnĂŒmu|shawabatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawabatnknĂŒmu|goshawabatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawabatnĂŒmu|gokishawabatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawabatshĂ«nĂŒ|shawabatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawabatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawabatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawabatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawabatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawabatshĂ«ro|shawabatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawabatnkshĂ«ro|goshawabatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawabatshĂ«ro|gokishawabatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawabatshĂ«mu|shawabatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawabatnkshĂ«mu|goshawabatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawabatshĂ«mu|gokishawabatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawabatronĂŒ|shawabatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawabatnkronĂŒ|goshawabatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawabatronĂŒ|gokishawabatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawabatroshĂ«|shawabatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawabatnkroshĂ«|goshawabatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawabatroshĂ«|gokishawabatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawabatromu|shawabatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawabatnkromu|goshawabatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawabatromu|gokishawabatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawabatmunĂŒ|shawabatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawabatnkmunĂŒ|goshawabatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawabatmunĂŒ|gokishawabatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawabatmushĂ«|shawabatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawabatnkmushĂ«|goshawabatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawabatmushĂ«|gokishawabatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawabatmuro|shawabatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawabatnkmuro|goshawabatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawabatmuro|gokishawabatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
